tools.name: researchAndBuy
tools.description: Research a token (curve, holders, creator rug flags), then buy if it passes filters. Returns decision + sig. Pass simulate:true for a dry-run that skips signing.

simulate.description: Dry-run: vet + quote but skip the actual buy.

tools.name: autoSnipe
tools.description: Poll getNewTokens, filter by rug/holder rules, buy each pass with perTradeSol until sessionSpendCapSol is hit. State (seen, spent) is persisted under sessionId so a restart resumes where it left off.

sessionId.description: Stable id to persist & resume seen/spent state. Reusing an id continues a prior session within the cap.

simulate.description: Dry-run: vet + log intended buys but skip signing. Spend cap still enforced as if real.

tools.name: copyTrade
tools.description: Watch a creator/wallet's recent trades and mirror their buys with size scaling. State (mirrored sigs, spent) persisted under sessionId.

tools.name: rugExitWatch
tools.description: Monitor held positions; auto-sell when top-holder concentration or dev-wallet sells cross thresholds. State (exited mints) persisted under sessionId.
